name: frugal
description: Cloud cost awareness for agents. Reminds the agent to check usage/billing before spending on metered services and to tear down what it provisions.

interface.longDescription: Metered cloud services (Vercel, Cloudflare, Neon, Railway, E2B, Browserbase, GitHub Actions...) silently bill by usage. Frugal injects cost-awareness rules at session start and drops a one-line reminder the moment a command touches a billable CLI — check usage first, announce paid resources, tear down test infra.
